titleStmt.title: SII 17.574: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 574. (A.R. No. 529 of 1904.) TIRUTTEṄGŪR, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Rajatagirīśvara temple.
This inscription refers to a grant made in the 30th year (1208 A.D.) of Periyadēvar Tribhuvaṉavīradēvar i.e., Kulōttuṅga III.

This epigraph records the undertaking given by the śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple of Tiruveḷḷiyaṅguṉṟam-uḍaiyār to continue to burn the lamp for which they received 4000 kāśu from Kuruppuḻāṉ Tiruvēkambamuḍaiyāṉ Tiruchchōṟṟuttuṟai-uḍaiyāṉ in the 30th year of the reign of Tribhuvanavīradēva. The lamp given by the donor is said to have weighed 200 palam. The donor is also mentioned in No. 575 below.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī ..tribhuvanaccakravarttikaḷ śrī rājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6 karuppuḻāṉ tiruvekampa muṭaiyāṉ tiruccoṟ
ṟuttuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyār tiruveḷḷiyaṅkuṉṟa muṭaiyār koyilil peri yatevar tiripuvaṉavīratevarkku muppatāvatu vait
ta tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Ikkoyil muppatu vaṭṭamum kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirā maṇarom Annāḷil Upaiyamākak kaikko
ṇṭa kācu 4 1000 Ikkācu nālāyiramum Annāḷil kaikkoṇṭu tirunantāviḷakku Erit tuvarukiṟapaṭiye cantirātittavarai Erikka
kkaṭavomākac cammatittom muppatu vaṭṭamum kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom Ittiruviḷakku Eriya Ivaṉ ceyvittu Iṭ
ṭa tirukkuttiviḷakku Oṉṟiṉāl Eṭai 2 100 la Irunūṟṟuppalam .
Digital edition of SII 17.574 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
